scenes.title: Through the Wall
scenes.biggestGap: Blade reads and thematic statements drift into abstraction unless each turn stays pinned to wall, chain, iron, pulse, and prison acoustics.

sceneContract.placeAnchor: Palace sublevel cells directly below the evidence vault, with service dark, vault corridor footfall, and stone carrying Frostmourne's pulse.
sceneContract.materialAnchor: Mortar seam, iron rings, cot frame, bucket water, torch pitch, and freezing masonry must stay in contact with the body.
sceneContract.povAnchor: Jaina filters threat through magical structure, cadence, and failure mode; Sylvanas answers by demanding road-usable phrasing through the wall.
sceneContract.dialogueAnchor: Wall-touch, chain scrape, wrist-ring click, fingertip tapping, and breath through stone keep the exchange embodied.
sceneContract.exitAnchor: The scene must close on two small prison sounds or surfaces carrying the blade onward, not on a thesis sentence.

scenes.title: The Visitor
scenes.biggestGap: The visitor and the five-face recognition both drift toward elegant summary unless size, voice, route clues, and remembered carriers stay material and prison-bound.

sceneContract.placeAnchor: A too-small palace cell with bars, threshold light, door timbers, and torch behavior that the visitor violates without effort.
sceneContract.materialAnchor: Ankle chain, cot wood, iron bars, threshold smear, spent pitch, and returning torchlight keep the supernatural reveal measurable.
sceneContract.povAnchor: Sylvanas reads by fit, breach, weaponless geometry, and remembered field details rather than by cosmological explanation.
sceneContract.dialogueAnchor: Each exchange with the visitor needs a physical counterweight: chain pull, wing fit, torch gutter, overhead pulse, breath through the wall.
sceneContract.exitAnchor: The ancient phrase and the five-face pattern must land through remembered objects and road textures, then resolve into one rough transferable clue from the cot.
